inventorymanagement.config.title: Inventory Management Config
inventorymanagement.position_edit.title: Edit button position
inventorymanagement.modEnabled.label: Mod enabled
inventorymanagement.modEnabled.tooltip: Simple toggle for the mod. Set to false to disable all features.
inventorymanagement.sorting.title: Sorting/Transfering
inventorymanagement.sorting.showSort.too: Show sort buttons in inventory and container screens.
inventorymanagement.sorting.showTransfer: Show transfer (place all / take all) buttons in inventory and container screens.
inventorymanagement.sorting.showStack.to: Show auto-stack buttons in inventory and container screens.
inventorymanagement.sorting.sortMode.too: How items are ordered when sorting. 'Alphabetical' sorts by item name; 'Creative menu order' uses the creative-inventory ordering.
inventorymanagement.sorting.containersFi: Place items that hold contents (shulker boxes, bundles, etc.) before other items. Only applies in alphabetical sort mode.
inventorymanagement.sorting.defaultPosit: Default on-screen position for the action buttons.
inventorymanagement.sorting.enableSlotLo: Allow locking player-inventory slots with Ctrl+click. When off, slot locking is disabled entirely: no markers or tooltips, and locked slots are no longer skipped by sort, auto-stack, and transfer. Slots you have already locked are remembered for when you turn it back on.
inventorymanagement.sorting.lockedSlotDi: When to draw the border and darkened background on locked inventory slots. 'Always shown' draws them at all times; 'Hidden' never draws them; 'While hotkey held' only draws them while the 'Peek locked slots' keybind is held. Locking (Ctrl+click) and the hover tooltip are unaffected.
inventorymanagement.hotbarSwap.title: Hotbar Swapping
inventorymanagement.hotbarSwap.enableHot: Enable the hotbar-swap feature. When off, the hotbar-swap modifier keybind does nothing (scrolling and number keys 1-3 no longer swap a row into the hotbar) and the swapped-row badge is hidden.
inventorymanagement.hotbarSwap.hotbarSwa: While holding the hotbar-swap key, let number keys 1-3 select a row to swap into the hotbar.
inventorymanagement.grouping.title: Sorting Groups
inventorymanagement.grouping.itemGroupin: Group color and variant families of items together (e.g. all wool colors, all terracotta) instead of sorting each variant purely by name.
inventorymanagement.grouping.dynamicGrou: Group items together based on datapack-defined item tags under the 'grouping/' folder. Master switch for all pack-defined grouping families.
Group items together based on datapack-defined item tags under the 'grouping/' folder.
inventorymanagement.grouping.wool.label: Wool
inventorymanagement.grouping.beds.label: Beds
inventorymanagement.grouping.dyes.label: Dyes
inventorymanagement.grouping.signs.label: Signs
inventorymanagement.grouping.boats.label: Boats
inventorymanagement.grouping.coral.label: Coral
inventorymanagement.durability.title: Item Durability
inventorymanagement.durability.durabilit: Show an action-bar message (and anvil ping) when a tool or equipped item drops past a low-durability threshold. Works on any server.
Percent-of-max durability values (1-99) that trigger the alert; each fires once as durability crosses it downward. Defaults to 10 and 5. File-edited; no GUI control.
Also fire the low-durability alert at exactly 1 durability point remaining, in addition to the percentage thresholds.
Play the anvil ping sound with the low-durability alert. The action-bar message always shows regardless.
When a held or worn item breaks, swap in a matching replacement from your inventory. Requires the mod on the server in multiplayer.
Relax auto-replace matching from strict (same item and enchantments) to similar (same category, ignoring material and enchantments).
